source_pr.title: executor: temporarily skip some unstable test cases
source_pr.body:
Skip the following test cases because they're not stable.

- testSuite1.TestAnalyzeFullSamplingOnIndexWithVirtualColumnOrPrefixColumn (#25274)
- testSuite5.TestSelectGlobalVar (#25272)
- inspectionSuite (#25271)
- testSuiteWithData.TestRangePartitionBoundariesBetweenS (#25269)

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note
